zh.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun是Hugues De Melun和Beatrix De Wavrin的女兒，於1370年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫。她於1399年10月1日與Jacques de Montmorency結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1421年在她的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich: 法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun是Hugues De Melun和Beatrix De Wavrin的女儿，于1370年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫。她于1399年10月1日与Jacques de Montmorency结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1421年在她的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: metonymic occupational name for a producer of melons (Spanish melón, French melon).

Spanish (Melón): habitational name principally from the town of Melón in Ourense (Galicia) or Melón in Vigo (also in Galicia). This is probably a topographic name (meaning ‘altitude, rock’), a word of pre-Roman origin.

variants.name: Mellon
meanings: English (Lancashire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulan in Seine-et-Oise, now known as Meulan-en-Yvelines.
Scottish (Lanarkshire; of Norman origin): variant of   Melville  .

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun was born in 1370, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France as the daughter of Hugues De Melun and Beatrix De Wavrin. She married Jacques de Montmorency on 1 October 1399. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1421, in her hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun est née en 1370, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, fille de Hugues De Melun et Beatrix De Wavrin. Elle a épousé Jacques de Montmorency le 1 octobre 1399. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun wurde 1370 in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich, als Tochter von Hugues De Melun und Beatrix De Wavrin geboren. Sie hat am 1. Oktober 1399 Jacques de Montmorency geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1421 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun è nata il nel 1370 nel Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia come figlia di Hugues De Melun e Beatrix De Wavrin. Lei sposato Jacques de Montmorency il 1 ottobre 1399. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1421, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melunは1370年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンでHugues De MelunとBeatrix De Wavrinの娘として生まれた。1399年10月1日にJacques de Montmorencyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1421年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun(은)는 1370년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 Hugues De Melun(와)과 Beatrix De Wavrin의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1399년 10월 1일 Jacques de Montmorency(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun nasceu em 1370, em Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França filha de Hugues De Melun e Beatrix De Wavrin. Ela casou-se com Jacques de Montmorency em 1 de outubro de 1399. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1421, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun родилась в 1370 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция. Её родителей звали Hugues De Melun и Beatrix De Wavrin. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jacques de Montmorency 1 октября 1399 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1421 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Philippa de Melun nació en 1370, en Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia como hija de Hugues De Melun y Beatrix De Wavrin. Se casó con Jacques de Montmorency el 1 de octubre de 1399. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1421, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
